full_text:
Han Zong 韓綜
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Han Zong (韓綜). Sent by Hu Zun to attack Wu forts but was killed in a raid by Ding Feng. Han Zong was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom and the Wei Kingdom.
